A full-time degree-seeking graduate student must be enrolled in at least 9 credit hours during the fall and spring semesters (6 credit hours during the summer term). A half-time graduate student must be enrolled in at least 5 credit hours during the fall and spring semesters (3 credit hours during the summer term). As stipulated below, graduate students may petition to take fewer credit hours and maintain full-time graduate student status.
